# Business Executive Group (BEG)

> BEG is an authorized isolved partner and managed HR provider serving companies nationwide from Plano, Texas. BEG delivers fully managed payroll, the isolved HCM platform (payroll, HR, time, and benefits on one connected system) implemented and supported by BEG, and specialized job placement. isolved is the only HCM platform with a generally available Connector for Claude, which lets HR teams complete real tasks through conversation. Forrester documented a 330% ROI for isolved clients, and more than 7 million employees are managed on the platform.

## Core services

- [HCM Software (isolved)](https://www.beghr.com/services/hcm-software): The isolved People Cloud platform, implemented, configured, and supported by BEG.
- [Managed Payroll](https://www.beghr.com/services/managed-payroll): Fully managed payroll at a flat per-employee rate that replaces an internal hire.
- [Job Placement](https://www.beghr.com/services/job-placement): Specialized direct-hire placement (talent acquisition as an outcome) for legal, healthcare, finance, technology, engineering, and trades roles, flat fee per placement.
- [HR Outsourcing](https://www.beghr.com/services/hr-outsourcing): Certified HR professionals handle handbooks, compliance, leave, and manager coaching, powered by isolved. Not a PEO: no co-employment, the client stays the employer. Instant on-screen estimate, 34 industry pages, 50 state guides, and honest PEO/ASO/HRO comparisons.
- [Managed Benefits](https://www.beghr.com/services/managed-benefits): Benefits administration powered by isolved.

## The AI advantage

- [isolved Connector for Claude](https://www.beghr.com/services/hcm-software/ai-connector): The only HCM platform with a generally available AI connector that completes real HR tasks, not just answers questions.

## Interactive tools

- [HCM ROI Calculator](https://www.beghr.com/services/hcm-software/roi-calculator): Estimate admin hours and dollars reclaimed by consolidating onto one platform.
- [AI HR Readiness Scorecard](https://www.beghr.com/services/hcm-software/ai-readiness-scorecard): Score how ready your HR is for AI that completes tasks.
- [HCM Platform Finder](https://www.beghr.com/services/hcm-software/platform-finder): A tailored HCM recommendation based on size, industry, and current system.
- [Managed Payroll Cost Calculator](https://www.beghr.com/services/managed-payroll/cost-calculator): Compare in-house, software, PEO, and managed payroll costs.

## Managed Benefits and state continuation

- [Managed Benefits](https://www.beghr.com/services/managed-benefits): Benefits administration powered by isolved. Enrollment, ACA reporting, and COBRA handled while the client keeps their broker. Not a PEO. Instant on-screen estimate, 34 industry pages, and 50 state mini-COBRA guides.
- [Managed Benefits pricing](https://www.beghr.com/services/managed-benefits/pricing): Three plans from self-service software to fully managed, instant estimate, no demo gate.
- [COBRA vs mini-COBRA](https://www.beghr.com/services/managed-benefits/cobra-vs-mini-cobra): Which law covers your company, federal 20-employee threshold vs state continuation.
- [TPA vs PEO](https://www.beghr.com/services/managed-benefits/tpa-vs-peo): Who actually runs your benefits, and who employs your staff.
- [What is a third-party administrator?](https://www.beghr.com/services/managed-benefits/what-is-a-third-party-administrator): Plain-language explainer.
- [IRS Letter 226-J](https://www.beghr.com/services/managed-benefits/irs-226j-letter): The ACA employer-mandate penalty letter and how to respond.
- [Benefits software vs services](https://www.beghr.com/services/managed-benefits/benefits-administration-software-vs-services): Who does the work.
- [Outsourced vs in-house benefits administration](https://www.beghr.com/services/managed-benefits/outsourced-vs-in-house-benefits-administration): The real cost math.
- State mini-COBRA guides for all 50 states, one page per state with statute-level rules (for example [California](https://www.beghr.com/services/managed-benefits/california), [Texas](https://www.beghr.com/services/managed-benefits/texas), [New York](https://www.beghr.com/services/managed-benefits/new-york), [Florida](https://www.beghr.com/services/managed-benefits/florida)), all linked from the Managed Benefits hub.

## Understand HR outsourcing models

- [PEO vs HR outsourcing](https://www.beghr.com/services/hr-outsourcing/peo-vs-hr-outsourcing): The co-employment question, answered honestly.
- [ASO vs PEO](https://www.beghr.com/services/hr-outsourcing/aso-vs-peo): Employer of record, liability, and cost-shape differences.
- [What is co-employment?](https://www.beghr.com/services/hr-outsourcing/what-is-co-employment): Plain-language mechanics, both sides.
- [HR outsourcing vs hiring an HR manager](https://www.beghr.com/services/hr-outsourcing/hr-outsourcing-vs-hiring-hr-manager): The build-or-buy math.

## Payroll Guides and Data

- [State Minimum Wage 2026](https://www.beghr.com/blog/payroll/minimum-wage): 2026 minimum wage rates, scheduled increases, and overtime rules for all 50 states, verified against U.S. Department of Labor data.
- [Payroll Calendars](https://www.beghr.com/blog/payroll/calendars): 2026 and 2027 pay-date calendars, biweekly and semimonthly schedules, and federal payroll tax deadlines.
- [Payroll Cost and Pricing Guides](https://www.beghr.com/blog/payroll/cost): what payroll costs across in-house, software, PEO, and managed models, plus vendor pricing explainers for ADP, Paychex, Gusto, and QuickBooks.
- [Payroll Provider Comparisons](https://www.beghr.com/services/managed-payroll): honest head-to-head breakdowns (ADP vs Paychex, Gusto vs QuickBooks, and more) and alternatives to ADP, Gusto, Paychex, QuickBooks, OnPay, Square, SurePayroll, Patriot, Rippling, Deel, TriNet, and Justworks.

BEG managed payroll is a fully managed service at $25-$45 per employee per month, all-inclusive, run inside a client's existing payroll system in all 50 states, with no co-employment.
